query:
SELECT stagingLane, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM qc_scan_sessions
WHERE stagingLane IS NOT NULL AND stagingLane != ''
GROUP BY stagingLane
ORDER BY stagingLane
LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
